title: How biomass delivers system stability in an uncertain energy landscape
snippet:
As geopolitical shocks reshape energy priorities and AI drives unprecedented power demand, Drax’s Chief Sustainability Officer Ross McKenzie explains why dispatchable renewables are essential to grid resilience.

The post How biomass delivers system stability in an uncertain energy landscape appeared first on Drax Global.
ai_summary: Drax positions biomass as a key dispatchable renewable asset for grid stability amid rising AI power demand. Relevant context for understanding competitor positioning and market narrative around renewable generation types.
ai_reasoning: Drax is a named competitor and this is thought leadership content on renewable generation and grid services. However, it's opinion/marketing rather than a product launch, regulatory change, or market-moving event. Worth monitoring competitor narrative but no immediate action required. Scores 5 for background understanding of competitive landscape.
